title: hemitelia horrida
intro: Hemitelia horrida is a type of fern, specifically a species of the family Hymenophyllaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hemitelia horrida include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Hemitelia horrida can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
